news.paragraph: Micron is seeing positive momentum as AI chip stocks surge, influenced by news regarding Nvidia's leadership and potential developments in China. Traders should also note reports suggesting an impending memory-chip shortage could provide a significant tailwind for the company within the AI infrastructure sector.
